title: Separate liveness and readiness probes for DB health
summary: Post-external-review metadata update. The diff contains only two .planwerk/ tracking files: progress JSON phase changed from awaiting_external_review to improving, and the external review JSON verdict changed from NEEDS_CHANGES to ADDRESSED with a resolution_summary added. No code, test, or documentation changes. The external review by berendt found zero blocking/critical/warning issues (2 INFO-level observations only), and the metadata updates correctly reflect that outcome.

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
